material_claims.claim: ATMTA stated that the pre-alpha UE5 Showroom launched on the Epic Games Store in September 2022 and announced Showroom R2.1 in June 2023.
Holosim has a first-party public-test record in June 2025, later Chapter 1 and Chapter 2 live statements, and a documented Chapter 2 delay and reschedule.
Holosim's browser surface can be described as live and updated within the dated evidence boundary, while feature availability remains build-specific.
The historical Showroom, the current Unreal client, C4, Holosim, and Fleet Command are aliases or share one aggregate lifecycle.
material_claims.reason: The sources establish related product surfaces and builds but do not establish identity-equivalence or one synchronized lifecycle.

material_claims.claim: Holosim testing proves mainnet deployment, transferable economic value, or delivery of every Fleet Command roadmap feature.
material_claims.reason: The source material explicitly frames Holosim as a testing and browser environment distinct from later mainnet delivery.

known_limitations: The Showroom release-note sequence after R2.1 is incomplete.
The principal Holosim product page lacks a preserved publication or update date.
Atlas Brew segments support topic chronology and external-video cueing but not inferred named-speaker commitments.
